name: Alchemize
description: Procure a random potion.

name: Anointed
description: Put every [gold]Rare[/gold] card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Automation
description: Every 10 cards you draw, gain [energy:1].

name: Beacon of Hope
description: Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] on your turn, other players gain half that much [gold]Block[/gold].

name: Beat Down
description: Play 3 random Attacks from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].

name: Believe in You
description: Another player gains [energy:3].

name: Bolas
description:
Deal 3 damage.
At the start of your next turn, return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Calamity
description: Whenever you play an Attack, add a random Attack into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Catastrophe
description: Play 2 random cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

name: Coordinate
description: Give another player 5 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.

name: Dark Shackles
description: Enemy loses 9 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.

name: Discovery
description: Choose 1 of 3 random cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs 0 [energy:1] this turn.

name: Dramatic Entrance
description: Deal 11 damage to ALL enemies.

name: Entropy
description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Transform[/gold] 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Equilibrium
description:
Gain 13 [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Retain[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn.

name: Eternal Armor
description: Gain 7 [gold]Plating[/gold].

name: Fasten
description: Gain an additional 5 [gold]Block[/gold] from Defend cards.

name: Finesse
description:
Gain 4 [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw 1 card.

name: Fisticuffs
description:
Deal 7 damage.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to damage dealt.

name: Flash of Steel
description:
Deal 5 damage.
Draw 1 card.

name: Gang Up
description:
Deal 10 damage.
Deals 5 additional damage for each time another player has attacked the enemy this turn.

name: Gold Axe
description: Deal damage equal to the number of cards played this combat.[InCombat]

name: Hand of Greed
description:
Deal 20 damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], gain 20 [gold]Gold[/gold].

name: Hidden Gem
description: A random card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] gains [gold]Replay[/gold] 2.

name: Huddle Up
description: ALL allies draw 2 cards.

name: Impatience
description: If you have no Attacks in your [gold]Hand[/gold], draw 2 cards.

name: Intercept
description:
Gain 9 [gold]Block[/gold].
Redirect all incoming attacks that would be dealt to another player this turn to you.

name: Jack of All Trades
description: Add 1 random Colorless card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Jackpot
description:
Deal 25 damage.
Add 3 random 0[energy:1] cards into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Knockdown
description:
Deal 10 damage.
The enemy takes double damage from other players this turn.

name: Lift
description: Give another player 11 [gold]Block[/gold].

name: Master of Strategy
description: Draw 3 cards.

name: Mayhem
description: At the start of your turn, play the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

name: Mimic
description: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the [gold]Block[/gold] on another player.

name: Mind Blast
description: Deal damage equal to the number of cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].[InCombat]

name: Nostalgia
description: The first Attack or Skill you play each turn is placed on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

name: Omnislice
description:
Deal 8 damage.
Damage ALL other enemies equal to the damage dealt.

name: Panache
description: Every time you play 5 cards in a single turn, deal 10 damage to ALL enemies.

name: Panic Button
description:
Gain 30 [gold]Block[/gold].
You cannot gain [gold]Block[/gold] from cards for 2 turns.

name: Prep Time
description: At the start of your turn, gain 4 [gold]Vigor[/gold].

name: Production
description: Gain [energy:2].

name: Prolong
description: Next turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your current [gold]Block[/gold].

name: Prowess
description:
Gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
Gain 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

name: Purity
description: Exhaust up to 3 cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Rally
description: ALL players gain 12 [gold]Block[/gold].

name: Rend
description:
Deal 20 damage.
Deals 5 additional damage for each unique debuff on the enemy.

name: Restlessness
description: If your [gold]Hand[/gold] is empty, draw 2 cards and gain [energy:2].

name: Rolling Boulder
description: At the start of your turn, deal 5 damage to ALL enemies and increase this damage by 5.

name: Salvo
description:
Deal 12 damage.
[gold]Retain[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn.

name: Scrawl
description: Draw cards until your [gold]Hand[/gold] is full.

name: Secret Technique
description: Put a Skill from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Secret Weapon
description: Put an Attack from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Seeker Strike
description:
Deal 6 damage.
Choose 1 of 3 cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Shockwave
description: Apply 3 [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.

name: Splash
description: Choose 1 of 3 random Attacks from another character to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.

name: Stratagem
description: Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], choose a card from it to put into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Tag Team
description:
Deal 11 damage.
The next Attack another player plays on the enemy is played an extra time.

name: The Bomb
description: At the end of 3 turns, deal 40 damage to ALL enemies.

name: The Gambit
description:
Gain 50 [gold]Block[/gold].
If you take unblocked attack damage this combat, die.

name: Thinking Ahead
description:
Draw 2 cards.
Put 1 card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

name: Thrumming Hatchet
description:
Deal 11 damage.
At the start of your next turn, return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Ultimate Defend
description: Gain 11 [gold]Block[/gold].

name: Ultimate Strike
description: Deal 14 damage.

name: Volley
description: Deal 10 damage to a random enemy X times.
